module_roles.objc3.core: foundational utility, text/data view, collection-shape, and option helpers
module_roles.objc3.errors: error identity, result helpers, and optional-to-error bridges
module_roles.objc3.keypath: typed key-path helpers that need text/data compatibility naming stability
module_roles.objc3.concurrency: out of scope for M306 beyond existing contract dependencies
module_roles.objc3.system: out of scope for M306 beyond existing contract dependencies

non_goals: generic ABI claims without live compiler/runtime backing
widening objc3.system to host core text/data helpers
